title: genista repens
intro: Genista repens, also known as Creeping broom or Squinancy grass, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. Genista repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
